generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Low-level driver sensor measuring temperature for automotive vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from automotive vehicle sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for numerical computation and solving differential equations"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, OptimizationService
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message-oriented middleware enabling real-time data exchange between sensors and DT platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService, OptimizationService, ControlService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms implemented with optimization techniques to update model parameters based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring services for safety and optimal performance via real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, SuboptimalPerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prediction services through simulations reproducing the Physical Twin's behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization using optimisers for system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedConfigurationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control via supervisory controllers for system operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for anomalies in system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for system state inference"
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimatedStateInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected during monitoring"
]

instance SuboptimalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suboptimal performance detected during monitoring"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics from simulation of Physical Twin behavior"
]

instance OptimizedConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized configuration derived from optimization algorithms"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detected by fault detection algorithms"
]

instance EstimatedStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System state inferred through state estimation algorithms"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated corrective action triggered by supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model for structural details of automotive vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model described by differential equations for vehicular motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model representing cyber and physical aspects of the automotive system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance Wheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Automotive wheels with specific size specifications"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Chassis with shape and structural design details"
]

instance BodyStyle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle body style for aerodynamic and structural properties"
]

instance AutomotiveEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing automotive vehicle components"
    base:contains Wheels, Chassis, BodyStyle
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Raspberry Pi controller subscribes to the RabbitMQ server for control commands targeting the fan and heatbed actuators, executing these commands through the communication server."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs calibration algorithms to update the models of the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment with the best estimate of the parameters; the resulting data informs monitors that check system safety and optimality, with violations triggering human or algorithmic changes to the Physical Twin."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker facilitates communication using AMQP protocol in a publish-subscribe topology. Message acknowledgments and durable queues ensure reliable data transmission between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server is deployed on a Raspberry Pi edge device for on-premise hosting, utilizing local computational resources with no cloud infrastructure. The deployment model is single-node edge computing, with scalability limited by the hardware capabilities of the Raspberry Pi."
]
